title: Cinnamon Client
description: Custom gui with cool hud elements that are great.
body:
# CinnamonClient: The Ultimate Client for Minecraft 1.21.6+            

CinnamonClient

**CinnamonClient** is a powerful utility mod for the Minecraft client, specifically crafted for versions 1.21.6 and beyond, built on the Fabric modding framework. I've poured countless hours into its development, using 90% Kotlin to ensure clarity, easy extensibility, and to give you real-time control over your game. This mod thrives thanks to players like you, and if you appreciate our work and want to support future development. [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.6-green.svg)](https://minecraft.net/) [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.7-green.svg)](https://minecraft.net/) [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-Mod-orange.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Kotlin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Kotlin-90%25-purple.svg)](https://kotlinlang.org/) --- ### Why Choose CinnamonClient? CinnamonClient isn't just another mod; it's designed to give you unparalleled customization and control over your Minecraft experience. Our focus is on enhancing your gameplay with a suite of flexible tools, all while maintaining a lightweight presence in your game. Unlike other mods that might dictate your setup, CinnamonClient offers **wide compatibility** within the broader modding ecosystem. And it does so without compromising the authentic Minecraft feel you love—it just helps you make it *your* Minecraft. **Here's what makes CinnamonClient stand out:** * **Lightweight & Modular:** Experience minimal impact on your game while having the freedom to toggle features as you need them. * **Fully Customizable HUD:** Drag, drop, and reposition elements live in-game to create your perfect display. * **Modern UI Framework:** Navigate intuitive, polished screens for effortless control. * **Packet-Level Integration:** Get advanced networking utilities and fine-tuned controls under the hood. * **Clean Kotlin Codebase:** Built 100% in Kotlin for a codebase that's easy to maintain and expand. --- ### 📥 Installation Guide CinnamonClient is built for **Fabric Loader**, which we highly recommend for the simplest and most efficient modding experience. If you're using a third-party launcher (like Prism Launcher or GDLauncher), it often has built-in features to help you install mod loaders automatically. Once you have Fabric Loader installed, simply place **CinnamonClient's .jar file** (along with the **Fabric API** and **Kotlin Fabric Mod** .jar files, as we're built entirely in Kotlin!) directly into your `mods` folder. * **Not sure if you installed the mod correctly?** After launching Minecraft, head into your in-game main menu. You should find a dedicated option to access CinnamonClient's settings and modules. This is your sign that everything's loaded up! * **Not sure how to configure the mod?** Don't worry, it's designed to be intuitive. Most of our modules are ready to use out-of-the-box. For deeper customization, simply enter **HUD Edit Mode** or explore the individual module settings within the GUI. You'll find everything laid out clearly. --- ### 🧩 Explore the Modules Every single module in CinnamonClient is something you can **toggle and fine-tune** right from your in-game GUI. You get complete control over your experience. #### HUD Elements | Module | What It Does | Key Features | | :---------------- | :------------------------------------------------ | :----------------------------------------------------------------------- | | **Keystrokes** | Visualizes your keyboard and mouse inputs. | Customizable layout, key remapping, full color control. | | **FPS Display** | Shows your current frames per second. | Configurable format, colors, and precise positioning. | | **Ping Display** | Displays your latency to the server. | Adjustable style and scaling options. | | **Armor HUD** | Renders your armor icons and durability. | Fully customizable layout and positioning. | | **Coordinates HUD** | Shows your X, Y, Z coordinates. | Axis labeling, formatting, and screen placement. | | **Spotify HUD** | Displays current Spotify track info and status. | Song title, artist, progress bar, customizable colors and position. | #### Utility Modules | Module | What It Does | Key Features | | :-------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------- | | **HUD Edit Mode** | Lets you drag and drop HUD elements in real-time. | Snapping helpers, alignment guides, dynamic scaling. | | **Fullbright** | Overrides in-game lighting for maximum brightness. | Simple toggle-based lighting control. | | **Simple Auto Clicker** | Automates mouse clicks at configurable intervals. | Adjustable clicks per second (CPS), toggle keybind, visual feedback. | | **Packet Handler** | Provides utilities for packet-layer interactions. | Powers internal UI interactions and other advanced features. | --- ### 🎨 Customization at Your Fingertips CinnamonClient offers deep customization, putting you in the driver's seat. #### Live HUD Editing Activate **HUD Edit Mode** through the main menu to transform your interface in real-time: * **Drag & Drop Functionality:** Move any element anywhere on your screen. * **Precision Alignment:** Use edge snapping and alignment guides for a perfect setup. * **Dynamic Scaling:** Resize elements to your exact preference. * **Visual Feedback:** See every change instantly as you make it. #### Per-Module Configuration Each module comes with its own dedicated settings, easily accessible via the GUI: * **Scaling:** Fine-tune element sizes for ideal display. * **Color Customization:** Personalize your aesthetic. * **Screen Positioning:** Place elements exactly where you want them. * **Keybinds & Behavior:** (e.g., Auto Clicker) Set toggle keys and click speed. --- ### 🐛 How to Report Issues If you encounter any bugs, crashes, or other issues, please use our **issue tracker** linked at the top of the page. Make sure you include as much detail as possible, such as what other mods you're using, and attach any crash or log files you have. This helps us fix things faster! --- ### 📞 Support & Contact **Author**: Cinnamonpuma * **GitHub**: [Issues & Discussions](https://github.com/Cinnamonpuma/CinnamonClient/issues) --- ### 📝 License This project is licensed under the **Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)**. See the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for full details. ---
 

Thank you for choosing CinnamonClient.

 

Crafted to enhance your Minecraft experience with powerful, modular utilities.
